caption: A man with light-colored, spiked hair wears glasses, headphones, a white shirt, a small red bow tie, and tan suspenders while sitting in a studio. He is positioned behind a black microphone, appearing to speak or listen. The background consists of a wall decorated with several small, framed photographs and a yellow poster with the word "LEE" visible. To his right, a white electronic device is mounted on the wall. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right sides of the frame; on the left is a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and on the right is text that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, with only slight shifts in his facial expression and head tilt, indicating a continuous shot of him during a recording session.
